chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Reward of Visiting the Prophet {saws} and the Imams {a.s}, Peace Be Upon Them All

text: 3174 - وَ قَالَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «مَنْ أَتَى قَبْرَ اَلْحُسَيْنِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ عَارِفاً بِحَقِّهِ كَتَبَهُ اَللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ فِي أَعْلَى عِلِّيِّينَ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3174 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"Whoever comes to the grave of Husayn (as) recognizing his right, Allah (swt), the Mighty and Exalted, will record them in the highest ranks of 'Illiyin."
